company: File Systems and Storage Lab (FSL), Stony Brook University
description: Designing distributed, secure, and reliable clusters for running machine learning applications. Setting up runtime platforms such as OpenShift and Kubernetes on top of CephFS, NFS, and other distributed file systems.

Developed VoIP and CEMQ services and managed OpenShift clusters as a full-time Cloud Engineer. Responsibilities spanned cluster orchestration, operator management, monitoring, and application delivery services.
